title: chamaemelum grisleyi
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, also known as Chamaemelum grisleyi, is a flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Europe and Western Asia, often referred to as chamomile. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of apigenin, a natural flavonoid compound that exhibits anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamaemelum grisleyi include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in sleep due to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of Chamaemelum grisleyi include teas, essential oils, and dried flowers, which can be used to create calming and soothing remedies for a variety of health issues.
